scripts.build: vite build --mode production && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --minify --legal-comments=none --outfile=dist/server.cjs && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist/server',{recursive:true}); require('fs').copyFileSync('server/workspaceSeed.json','dist/server/workspaceSeed.json')"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:audit && npm run verify
scripts.test:unit: node --import tsx/esm --test scripts/audit-tests/unit-writeoff.mjs scripts/audit-tests/unit-restore-writeoff.mjs scripts/audit-tests/unit-routing.mjs scripts/audit-tests/unit-license-server.mjs scripts/audit-tests/unit-warehouse-full-lifecycle.mjs scripts/audit-tests/unit-lifecycle.mjs scripts/audit-tests/unit-totp.mjs && node --test scripts/audit-tests/unit-equipment.mjs scripts/audit-tests/unit-validation.mjs scripts/audit-tests/unit-backup-license.mjs scripts/audit-tests/unit-activities-cap.mjs
